description.zh-cn: 预售活动：为 SKU 配置预售价、定金与定金膨胀(可抵金额)、预售时段与发货日期；预售期内购买自动按预售价并叠加定金膨胀抵扣，前台展示预售信息。
description.en: Pre-sale: configure presale price, deposit and deposit-expansion (creditable amount), presale window and ship date per SKU; during presale, apply presale price plus deposit-expansion discount, with storefront presale info.
